title: draba eschscholtzii
intro: Draba eschscholtzii, also known as Eschscholtz's Draba, is a perennial plant species in the mustard family (Brassicaceae) that grows in the mountainous regions of the western United States. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Draba eschscholtzii include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate coughs and colds, and soothe digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Draba eschscholtzii include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or orally to harness its medicinal properties.
